original_issue.thesis: The phrase 'sober-curious' is migrating from alcohol-abstinence framing into caffeine-adoption framing, consolidating iced matcha, wellness energy drinks, and flavored pouches under a single buyer identity — the whitespace is a social-occasion caffeine brand built for hospitality distribution, a channel no current player owns.
